_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Define and/or implement policies and procedures to enable an AI risk assessment process and assess risk mitigation efforts.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct AI system risk classification under the EU AI Act, documenting risk category determination, applicable requirements identification, and conformity assessment pathway selection.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-S-005 (AG, cosine: 0.729), RC-S-008 (RC, cosine: 0.688).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.577). Shared vocabulary: [ai, assessment, risk]. DCWF-only terms [assess, define, efforts, enable, implement, mitigation] vs WIDAI-only terms [act, applicable, category, classification, conduct, conformity] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.867, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Define and/or implement policies and procedures to enable an AI risk assessment" and "Conduct AI system risk classification under the EU AI Act, documenting risk cate" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.741 > STS 0.577 (gap +0.164). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, assessment, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [ai, assessment, risk]. DCWF-only: [assess, define, efforts, enable, implement, mitigation]. WIDAI-only: [act, applicable, category, classification, conduct, conformity].
